zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert d’Arcy - Lord of Nocton於1091年出生在英國林可爾史爾諾可頓時，他的父親Lord Norman II d’Arcy26歲，母親Mrs Norman Darcy28歲。他於1142年與Lady Alice de Cauz在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾諾可頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1163年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾林肯享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert d’Arcy - Lord of Nocton于1091年出生在英国林可爾史爾諾可頓时，他的父亲Lord Norman II d’Arcy26岁，母亲Mrs Norman Darcy28岁。他于1142年与Lady Alice de Cauz在英国英格兰林可爾史爾諾可頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1163年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾林肯享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: d’Arcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Brendan, Eamonn, Maeve, Malachy, Niamh, Seamus.  French Gisele, Julien, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Clemence, Dominique, Emile, Gilles, Jean-Paul, Laure.
English (Lancashire) and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Arcy in Manche, France, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’.

Irish: in Ireland, this is generally the Norman name (see 1 above), established in Meath by Sir William D'Arcy in the 1360s, but it was also adopted for Ó Dorchaidhe ‘descendant of the dark one’, from dorcha ‘dark, gloomy’, a Connacht name that fell together with the Norman surname, which was introduced by Sir William D'Arcy and Sir John D'Arcy, Chief Justiciar of Ireland in the 14th century.

variants.name: Darcey
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and Irish (Tipperary): variant of   Darcy  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert d’Arcy - Lord of Nocton was born in 1091, in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Lord Norman II d’Arcy, was 26 and his mother, Mrs Norman Darcy, was 28. He married Lady Alice de Cauz in 1142, in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died in 1163, in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert d’Arcy - Lord of Nocton est né en 1091, à Nocton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord Norman II d’Arcy, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mrs Norman Darcy, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alice de Cauz en 1142, à Nocton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé en 1163, à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert d’Arcy - Lord of Nocton 1091 in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Norman II d’Arcy 26 und seine Mutter Mrs Norman Darcy 28. Er hat 1142 in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Alice de Cauz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1163 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert d’Arcy - Lord of Nocton è nato il nel 1091 nel Nocton, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Lord Norman II d’Arcy, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Norman Darcy, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Lady Alice de Cauz nel 1142, nel Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1163, nel Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert d’Arcy - Lord of Noctonが1091年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアノクトンで生まれた時，父Lord Norman II d’Arcyは26歳，母Mrs Norman Darcyは28歳であった。1142年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアノクトンでLady Alice de Cauzと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1163年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert d’Arcy - Lord of Nocton(이)가 1091년 영국 링코실르 노크턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Norman II d’Arcy(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Norman Darcy(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1142년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 노크턴에서 Lady Alice de Cauz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1163년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 링코컨에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert d’Arcy - Lord of Nocton nasceu em 1091, em Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Norman II d’Arcy, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Norman Darcy, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alice de Cauz em 1142, em Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1163, em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert d’Arcy - Lord of Nocton родился в 1091 г. в местности ноктон, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Norman II d’Arcy было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Norman Darcy, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alice de Cauz в 1142 г. в местности ноктон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер в 1163 г. в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert d’Arcy - Lord of Nocton nació en 1091, en Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Norman II d’Arcy, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mrs Norman Darcy, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Lady Alice de Cauz en 1142, en Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1163, en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años.
